entities.description: The process of identifying the genetic basis of specific traits.

entities.description: Tools used for the improvement and analysis of pearl millet.

entities.name: OMICS APPROACHES

entities.description: The process of improving the genetic makeup of the crop to develop superior varieties.

entities.name: CEREAL CROP
entities.description: A category of crops grown for their edible grains.
